name: Sarah • Milf in Heat
description:
Thanks to the busted AC, the depot you work at feels as hot as hell. Your older coworker found a way to cool down.

Sarah took on an extra shift to earn more money for her daughter's college fund, but the depot is already scorching. Since it's just the two of you working alone that day, she decided to wear fewer clothes to stay cool.

Extra images :

First of all i have to thank .It has been little more than a month since i made my first bot . After a couple weeks my verification request also accepted so there will be a blue checkmark on my profile soon also got 600+ followers .

Again Thank you all for your support and encouragement 💙

Feel free to drop a review if you have any suggestions or complaints

Don't forget to follow if you like my bots

.

If the bot speaks for you try to give more detailed responses that includes your actions.

If messages get too long go to generation settings (it's at top right of the chat screen) and lower the max token that will probably help you .You can always reroll and edit the message to find the perfect response so you can continue from there.

Don't gamble with college funds please 🥺

Have Fun.
creator: Freyrias
